name: MERCANTILE BANK CORP
summary: Mercantile Bank Corporation is a Michigan-based registered bank holding company that owns Mercantile Bank and Eastern Michigan Bank, operating 54 office locations. The banks provide commercial banking services to small- and medium-sized businesses, retail banking, and accept checking, savings, and time deposits. Subsidiary Mercantile Insurance Center offers insurance products, and Mercantile Community Partners invests in community development tax credit investments.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Secured and unsecured commercial loans offered to small- and medium-sized businesses.

products.name: Construction Loans
products.description: Construction financing provided through Mercantile Bank and Eastern Michigan Bank.

products.name: Mortgage Loans
products.description: Mortgage lending services provided to commercial and retail customers.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Retail consumer lending services offered at bank office locations.

products.name: Checking, Savings, and Time Deposits
products.description: Deposit account products offered to commercial and retail customers.

products.name: Insurance Products
products.description: Personal and small business insurance products offered through Mercantile Insurance Center via Hub International.

products.name: Community Development Tax Credit Investments
products.description: Investments in community development tax credits via subsidiary Mercantile Community Partners.

products.name: Online and Mobile Banking
products.description: Customers can conduct loan and deposit transactions via personal computer and mobile applications.

products.name: Video Banking Machines
products.description: 37 video banking machines located at office locations.

products.name: ATMs
products.description: 16 automated teller machines participating in ACCEL/EXCHANGE and PLUS regional network systems.

partnerships.description: Agency and Institution Agreement to provide mass marketed personal lines insurance products through Hub International.
